hyperedges.label: Database lifecycle management (init, persist, cleanup, query)

nodes.label: analyses SQLite Table
nodes.rationale: Central persistence layer; all analysis results plus log text stored here. failure_category added via ALTER TABLE migration to avoid breaking existing deployments.

nodes.label: Failure Category Taxonomy
nodes.rationale: Six-value enum (build, test, dependency, infrastructure, pipeline, other) enforced both in system prompt and in _parse_llm_json validation with default fallback to 'other'.

nodes.label: Autonomous Fix Agent (planned /fix endpoint)
nodes.rationale: Planned extension to use LLM tool-use for autonomous actions (git commits, PR creation, pipeline reruns) using SQLite history as context. No architectural changes to current service required.

nodes.label: Natural Language Query over SQLite Analytics
nodes.rationale: POST /query endpoint uses LLM to translate natural-language questions to read-only SELECT SQL, enforcing safety via regex guard. QUERY_SYSTEM_PROMPT provides table schema and rules to LLM.
nodes.norm_label: natural language query over sqlite analytics

nodes.label: Background DB Cleanup Task
nodes.rationale: asyncio task started in lifespan runs every 24h deleting rows older than RETENTION_DAYS (default 365). Sleep-first pattern means first cleanup is 24h after startup.

nodes.label: tail_lines Log Trimming
nodes.rationale: Optional per-request parameter to send only the last N lines to LLM, reducing token cost for large logs while preserving the error-dense tail section.

hyperedges.label: Database lifecycle management (init, persist, cleanup, query)
